productDisplayName: Puma Men Grey Cat Runner Sports Shoes
description: Get used to maximum comfort and performance while running in the cat Runner shoes from puma. These shoes work as hard as you to help you run longer and stronger. Upper Mesh upper for a high degree of breathability and lowering risk of blistering Synthetic overlays in formstripe and cat logo design for secure Fit and style Lace-ups for snug fit Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Midsole Phylon midsole for impact protection and lightweight comfort Outsole Heel construction that distributes impact across the outsole allowing softer propulsion TPU outsole for durability shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Store shoes away from direct sunlight
